name: RPlog_The_Capital_s_Underworld_An_Unexpected_Visit_Pt._2
title: The Capital's Underworld: An Unexpected Visit, Part 2
summary: Continuing their tense office confrontation on New Alderaan, the crime lord Bavon Nass presses Senator Tokoga of Dac and the medic Myiari to validate his protection operation as legitimate private security in a city overwhelmed by Core World refugees. Myiari concedes that private security has a place but condemns the intimidation Nass's enforcers use against those who cannot pay, while Tokoga flatly names Nass for what he is: the man at the top of the gangs and lowlives. Nass argues that he shields shopkeepers from swoop gangs and vandalism, and proposes the two work with him to reconcile his interests with the law. Both refuse, the Senator pointing him toward debtor's court instead of extortion. Nass leaves with a veiled threat to manipulate the media against Tokoga unless his people are left alone, and the Senator dismisses him by quietly opening the door, the standoff unresolved.
